name: property managers managing 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 properties/month, missed lease renewals cause cash flow gaps. We automate renewal reminders instead of manual tracking of lease dates using spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking lease expiry dates and scheduling renewals.
features: Extract lease expiry dates from documents
Provide a dashboard for tracking lease statuses

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking lease expiry dates and scheduling renewals.

Provide a dashboard for tracking lease statuses
